name: nyx
author: NYX Dev Team
description: NYX is a premium, high-fidelity AI coding environment and runner that executes powerful local models on your GPU and orchestrates cloud LLMs, featuring persistent semantic memory, silent reasoning traces, local Vulkan GPU acceleration, live web search grounding, and a beautifully crafted interface.

scripts.dev:clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.rmSync('node_modules/.vite', {recursive:true, force:true})" && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server && npm run tauri build
scripts.build:server: esbuild server.ts --bundle --minify --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist-server/server.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; import { fileURLToPath } from 'url'; import { dirname } from 'path'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url); const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url); const __dirname = dirname(__filename);" --external:better-sqlite3 --external:onnxruntime-node --external:esbuild --external:sharp --external:lightningcss --external:pino --external:pino-pretty --external:thread-stream --external:vite --external:swagger-ui-express --external:@fastify/swagger-ui --external:keytar --external:@opentelemetry/sdk-node --external:@opentelemetry/auto-instrumentations-node --external:@opentelemetry/exporter-trace-otlp-http && esbuild server/worker.ts --bundle --minify --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist-server/worker.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; import { fileURLToPath } from 'url'; import { dirname } from 'path'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url); const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url); const __dirname = dirname(__filename);" --external:better-sqlite3 --external:onnxruntime-node --external:esbuild --external:sharp --external:lightningcss --external:pino --external:pino-pretty --external:thread-stream --external:vite --external:swagger-ui-express --external:@fastify/swagger-ui --external:keytar --external:@opentelemetry/sdk-node --external:@opentelemetry/auto-instrumentations-node --external:@opentelemetry/exporter-trace-otlp-http && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist-server/server/python', { recursive: true }); fs.readdirSync('server/python').forEach(f => { if (fs.statSync('server/python/' + f).isFile()) fs.copyFileSync('server/python/' + f, 'dist-server/server/python/' + f); })"
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); if (fs.existsSync('dist-server')) fs.rmSync('dist-server', { recursive: true, force: true }); if (fs.existsSync('dist-desktop')) fs.rmSync('dist-desktop', { recursive: true, force: true })"
